global.title: US releases video said to show seventh night of Iran strikes - Reuters
global.summary: Reuters reports the U.S. released video it says shows a seventh consecutive night of strikes on Iran, signaling the conflict is continuing rather than easing.
global.whyItMatters: Ongoing war in the Middle East shapes prayer, pastoral care, and how congregations think about peace, fear, and global instability.

global.title: China’s Xi Hosts Global AI Meeting - Newsweek
global.summary: Xi Jinping hosted a global AI cooperation meeting in Shanghai, highlighting China’s effort to shape international leadership in artificial intelligence.
global.whyItMatters: AI is becoming a moral, cultural, and economic force pastors will need to address with wisdom and discernment.

global.title: How the cyclospora parasite could affect Taco Bell and other food companies - Reuters
global.summary: Reuters highlights concerns about cyclospora and the pressure food companies face when outbreaks raise public-health fears.
global.whyItMatters: Food safety stories touch everyday family life and can open pastoral conversations about vulnerability, trust, and care for neighbors.

canadian.title: Canadian wildfires blanket the Northeast in thick smoke - NBC News
canadian.summary: Smoke from Canadian wildfires is spreading widely into the U.S. Northeast, showing the cross-border scale of this fire season.
canadian.whyItMatters: This keeps Canada’s wildfire crisis in view and underscores the need for prayer, practical care, and community readiness.

canadian.title: Canadian wildfire smoke brings dangerous air quality to more than 100 million people in the Midwest and Northeast - CNN
canadian.summary: CNN reports Canadian wildfire smoke is creating dangerous air quality for more than 100 million people in the U.S. Midwest and Northeast.
canadian.whyItMatters: The breadth of the impact highlights how Canadian environmental events are affecting millions and may shape local concern in B.C. as well.

canadian.title: 5 stories shaping Canadian auto this week: Dealers leery of China; Dongfeng eyes Canada; more - Automotive News
canadian.summary: A roundup of Canadian auto developments points to dealer caution around China and fresh interest in the Canadian market from Dongfeng.
canadian.whyItMatters: Economic shifts in major industries affect jobs, household stability, and the pressures families in church communities carry.

persecutedChurch.title: Church of England votes to hear Palestinian Christians on Israeli genocide in Gaza - Middle East Eye
persecutedChurch.summary: The Church of England’s General Synod voted to hear testimony from Palestinian Christians through the Kairos Palestine document despite pushback.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This draws attention to suffering Christian communities in the Holy Land and invites informed, prayerful engagement.

persecutedChurch.title: Germany upgrades security stance to 'high threat level', interior minister tells paper - Reuters
persecutedChurch.summary: Reuters reports Germany has raised its security posture to a high threat level amid wider tensions.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: Heightened threat environments often increase pressure on faith communities and minorities, including churches and Jewish communities.

leadership.title: Why So Many Professionals Are Rethinking Success - Forbes
leadership.summary: Forbes argues many leaders are redefining success beyond credentials and pay toward trust, mission, health, learning, and resilience.
leadership.whyItMatters: This is a helpful lens for pastoral leadership, where fruitfulness depends on character, trust, and long-term faithfulness more than visible achievement.

goodNews.title: ‘Heroes of Beauty’ ceremony links Holocaust survivors and IDF soldiers - Ynetnews
goodNews.summary: An annual ceremony in Bat Yam honored Holocaust survivors, celebrating dignity, memory, and the chain of generations through families and community leaders.
goodNews.whyItMatters: It is a hopeful picture of honoring elders, preserving memory, and strengthening intergenerational bonds in a fractured time.
